rule_metadata.name: contains_base64
rule_metadata.author: Jaume Martin
rule_metadata.description: This rule finds for base64 strings

rules.rule_text:
rule contains_base64 : Base64
{
	meta:
		author = "Jaume Martin"
		description = "This rule finds for base64 strings"
		version = "0.2"
		notes = "https://github.com/Yara-Rules/rules/issues/153"

	strings:
		$a = /([A-Za-z0-9+\/]{4}){3,}([A-Za-z0-9+\/]{2}==|[A-Za-z0-9+\/]{3}=)?/

	condition:
		$a
}
